class.name: MOT_BUSQUEDA
class.help: Administra las Motivaciones de Busquedas Laborales.
class.label: Motivacion Busqueda Laboral

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_mot_busqueda as oi_mot_busqueda, t0.c_mot_busqueda as c_mot_busqueda, t0.d_mot_busqueda as d_mot_busqueda, SEC.policy, t0.c_mot_busqueda as CODE, t0.d_mot_busqueda as TEXT FROM POS08_MOTIV_BUSQ as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.MotivacionBusqueda.MOT_BUSQUEDA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_mot_busqueda LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_mot_busqueda asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_mot_busqueda as oi_mot_busqueda, SEC.policy FROM POS08_MOTIV_BUSQ as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.MotivacionBusqueda.MOT_BUSQUEDA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_mot_busqueda LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_mot_busqueda asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.MotivacionBusqueda.MOT_BUSQUEDA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.MotivacionBusqueda.MOT_BUSQUEDA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(POS08_MOTIV_BUSQ.oi_mot_busqueda) as CNT from POS08_MOTIV_BUSQ Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and POS08_MOTIV_BUSQ.oi_mot_busqueda={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(POS08_MOTIV_BUSQ.d_mot_busqueda,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(POS08_MOTIV_BUSQ.c_mot_busqueda,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
